lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused), no errors

notes: Added StepToolForExport interface and optional stepTools field to ExportPdfOptions. Added buildStepToolsMap() helper. Updated computeStepMonthlyCost() to accept toolsMap and sum tool cost_per_month in addition to labor cost (handles steps with tool cost but no labor time/frequency). Fixed step costs table filter from .filter(s => s.hours > 0) to .filter(s => s.hours > 0 || s.cost > 0) so tool-only steps appear. In canvas-view.tsx: added fetchStepToolsByStep import, parallel-fetched step tools for all steps when costAnalysis enabled (Promise.allSettled to handle BUG-035 gracefully), passed exportStepTools to createWorkspacePdf. exportStepTools cleared when costAnalysis disabled.
